summary: The diff implements all 7 requirements with strong coverage. Backend CRUD and dose logging are present in backend/main.mo. All three frontend pages (Today Schedule, Medications, History) are implemented. The visual theme is applied via index.css with warm coral/neutral palette. The logo is rendered in Layout.tsx. One minor gap exists: the backend lacks a method to retrieve overall dose history across ALL medications in a single call (only per-medication getDoseHistory exists), though the frontend works around this by calling getDoseHistory per medication ID.

missing_requirements.requirement: Overall dose history can be retrieved across all medications (single backend call)
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only exposes getDoseHistory(medicationId) which queries per-medication. There is no getAllDoseHistory() or equivalent backend function that returns dose logs across all medications in one call. The frontend compensates by calling getDoseHistory for each medication ID individually.

hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention dark mode support, but the CSS includes a full .dark variant with alternative color tokens, and the app wraps with ThemeProvider from next-themes with enableSystem.

The build request explicitly lists user authentication as a non-goal, yet the diff includes a full InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook, and useActor that handles authenticated vs. anonymous actor creation.
